footer.tagline: LLM interview prep: big-tech roles, RAG / Agent focus—spaced review plus the knowledge starmap.
footer.newsletterDesc: Syllabus and product updates (demo—no backend yet).

reviewLanding.badge: Big-tech LLM roles · RAG / Agent focus
reviewLanding.subtitle: Mastery tracking and spaced review for RAG and Agent topics—plus the knowledge starmap and full chat when you need depth.
reviewLanding.tapToSwitchStep: Tap a card to switch steps
reviewLanding.flowDesc: Self-ratings and mistakes become your memory; spacing schedules what to review next; resume hooks and follow-up chains come later. The diagram illustrates a generic research-style study loop.
reviewLanding.step1Desc: A three-level topic tree with cards: key points, common follow-ups, and pitfalls—starting with RAG and Agent.
reviewLanding.step2Desc: Push “due today” from the curve so time goes to real weak spots.
reviewLanding.step3Desc: Roam LLM topics in the starmap for the big picture, then drill with cards.
reviewLanding.starsDesc: Browse topics and links in the starmap. Build a mental map, then return to spaced cards.
reviewLanding.finalSubtitle: Start with today's queue and grow your mastery profile.

review.hubSubtitle: LLM interview prep · RAG / Agent. Syllabus browser and sync will ship incrementally.
review.cardTodayDesc: Work through today's scheduled cards and shore up weak areas.
review.cardStarsDesc: Browse topics and links in the LLM starmap alongside card review.
review.todayMockHint: Demo: static sample cards. Question bank and FSRS/SM-2 scheduling will plug in later.
review.todayDone: That's the demo deck. Return to the hub or run another round.
review.card1Front: What are common hybrid retrieval strategies?
review.card1Back: Blend sparse (e.g. BM25) with dense vectors; add query rewrite or HyDE when it helps; trade off latency, cost, and recall quality.
review.card2Front: How do you reduce hallucinated tool calls in agents?
review.card2Back: Strict tool schemas and argument validation; timeouts, retries, circuit breakers; treat tool outputs as untrusted; human-in-the-loop when needed.

ai.title: Review assistant · Chat
ai.placeholder: Ask anything, e.g. What does reranking do in RAG?
ai.copyFailed: Copy failed; select and copy manually
ai.hubPageSubtitle: Core AI entry for this project. Use full chat for long multi-turn sessions.
